headline: MaintainX Acquisition to Bolster Autodesk, Inc. (ADSK) Prospects as One of the Best  Falling Stocks to Invest In
summary: Autodesk, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADSK) is one of the best falling stocks to invest in, according to analysts. On June 15, Autodesk, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADSK) amended its credit agreements to obtain access to significant capital to complete the acquisition of MaintainX Inc. The regulatory filing indicates the company increased its unsecured revolving credit facility to $2 billion from […]
